text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio continues to train day after day for
her next race, the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a press conference is held for the race
participants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio proudly proclaims her intention of
winning, but is followed quickly Mejiro McQueen,
who also claims she will be victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly between the two ambitious racers as
they prepare to face each other on the track.
